---
title: "Talks"
title-block-banner: true
image: /assets/images/social-profile.png
image-alt: "Profile picture of Mickaël CANOUIL"
body-classes: talks-page
toc: true
toc-location: right
listing:
  - id: talks
    template: ../assets/listing-templates/talks.ejs
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [title, description, date, categories, venue, slides, code, video, blog, meetup]
    contents:

      - title: "The Grammar of Graphics Assembles"
        venue: "Online (ggplot2 Extenders)"
        date: "2026-06-30"
        description: "Gribouille brings the grammar of graphics natively to Typst: no R session, no Python environment, figures compiled alongside prose in the same Typst pass."
        categories: [r, ggplot2, typst, gribouille, english]
        slides: https://m.canouil.dev/2026-ggplot2-extenders-gribouille/
        code: https://github.com/mcanouil/2026-ggplot2-extenders-gribouille

      - title: "Building Great Tools with Generative LLMs"
        venue: "Online — Alsinova CRO / Astek"
        date: "2026-06-23"
        description: "A case study in AI-assisted R package development using Claude Code as a structured development partner."
        categories: [r, ai, llm, development, english]
        slides: https://m.canouil.dev/2026-ai-assisted-dev/
        code: https://github.com/mcanouil/2026-ai-assisted-dev

      - title: "Introduction to Development Containers"
        venue: "Online — Alsinova CRO / Astek"
        date: "2025-10-08"
        description: "Devcontainers as a modern approach to creating consistent, reproducible development environments."
        categories: [devcontainer, docker, development, reproducibility, english]
        slides: https://m.canouil.dev/2025-devcontainer-introduction/
        code: https://github.com/mcanouil/2025-devcontainer-introduction

      - title: "A Gentle Introduction to Quarto"
        venue: "Online — Alsinova CRO / Astek"
        date: "2023-10-19"
        description: "An introduction to Quarto, the next-generation scientific and technical publishing system."
        categories: [quarto, publishing, reproducibility, markdown, english]
        slides: https://m.canouil.dev/2023-gentle-intro-to-quarto/
        code: https://github.com/mcanouil/2023-gentle-intro-to-quarto

      - title: "R Lille Meetup — My Journey To Transparency And Reproducibility"
        venue: "Online (R Lille)"
        date: "2021-04-15"
        description: "A journey towards a more transparent and reproducible work environment using Docker and `renv`."
        categories: [r, docker, renv, reproducibility, meetup, english]
        slides: https://m.canouil.dev/slides/20210415-journey-reproducibility/
        code: https://github.com/mcanouil/journey-reproducibility
        blog: https://rlille.fr/posts/2021-03-26-journey-transparency/
        meetup: https://www.meetup.com/R-Lille/events/277031496/
        video: https://www.youtube.com/embed/1CE8crjkwYY

      - title: "Min 2 Rien — My Journey To Transparency And Reproducibility (French)"
        venue: "Online (Lille, France)"
        date: "2021-04-14"
        description: "Une transition vers un environnement de travail plus transparent et reproductible avec Docker et `renv`."
        categories: [r, docker, renv, reproducibility, french]
        slides: https://m.canouil.dev/slides/20210414-journey-reproducibility/
        code: https://github.com/mcanouil/journey-reproducibility
        blog: https://www.min2rien.fr/le-reseau-metier-min2rien-organise-sa-semaine-retours-dexperience-2021/
        video: https://pod.univ-lille.fr/video/19711-semaine-retex-min2rien-2021-my-journey-to-transparency-and-reproducibility/?is_iframe=true

      - title: "R Lille Meetup — Débuter avec R en commençant par le début (French)"
        venue: "Online (R Lille)"
        date: "2021-01-07"
        description: "Trucs et astuces pour bien démarrer avec R et RStudio."
        categories: [r, setup, tips, project, good practices, french, meetup]
        slides: https://m.canouil.dev/slides/20201007-r-startup/
        code: https://github.com/mcanouil/rstartup
        blog: https://rlille.fr/posts/2020-09-10-debuter-avec-r/
        meetup: https://www.meetup.com/R-Lille/events/273159362/

      - title: "NACHO — NanoString nCounter Quality Control (Research Seminar)"
        venue: "Lausanne, Switzerland"
        date: "2019-09-06"
        description: "An R package for quality control of NanoString nCounter data. DOI: 10.1093/bioinformatics/btz647."
        categories: [quality control, NanoString nCounter, gene expression, r, shiny, dashboard, normalisation, english, research]
        slides: https://m.canouil.dev/slides/20190906-nacho/
        code: https://github.com/mcanouil/NACHO_slides

      - title: "Jointly Modelling SNPs With Longitudinal and Time-to-Event Trait"
        venue: "Lund University Diabetes Centre — Malmö, Sweden"
        date: "2019-01-21"
        description: "Joint modelling applied to type 2 diabetes and fasting plasma glucose. DOI: 10.3389/fgene.2018.00210."
        categories: [joint modelling, survival analysis, longitudinal biomarker, genetics, type 2 diabetes, glycaemia, english, research]
        slides: https://m.canouil.dev/slides/20190121-joint-model-snp/
        code: https://github.com/mcanouil/joint_model

      - title: "Ph.D. Defense (French)"
        venue: "Université de Lille — Faculté de Médecine"
        date: "2017-09-29"
        description: "Statistical methods for multi-omics studies in type 2 diabetes."
        categories: [phd defense, joint modelling, genetics, type 2 diabetes, french, research]
        slides: https://github.com/mcanouil/slides/raw/main/20170929-phd-defense/20170929-phd-defense.pdf
        code: https://github.com/mcanouil/phd-thesis/tree/master/BeamerThesis

      - title: "Statistical Methods for Post Genomic Data (SMPGD)"
        venue: "Lille, France"
        date: "2016-02-11"
        description: "Revisiting associations of SNPs with blood fasting glucose in normoglycemic individuals."
        categories: [joint modelling, longitudinal biomarker, genetics, type 2 diabetes, english, research]
        slides: https://github.com/mcanouil/slides/raw/main/20160211-longitudinal-genetic-modelling/20160211-longitudinal-genetic-modelling.pdf
        code: https://github.com/mcanouil/phd-thesis/tree/master/SMPGD2016
---
